title: nepeta cyanea subsp. cyanea
intro: Nepeta cyanea subsp. cyanea is a subspecies of the Nepeta cyanea plant, commonly known as the 'blue catmint', a member of the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory qualities. The health benefits of Nepeta cyanea subsp. cyanea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Nepeta cyanea subsp. cyanea can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
